graphics¶

keyword default attribute value

custom_bar_width_limit 0

edge_limit 120    
    unique True
       
edgecolor None    
    optional True
    unique True
       
edgewidth None    
    optional True
    unique True

    type bool
    unique True
       
horizontal True    
    type bool
    unique True
       
line_color [‘blue’, ‘crimson’, ‘darkgreen’, ‘olive’, ‘mediumvioletred’, ‘blueviolet’, ‘mediumseagreen’, ‘darkgoldenrod’, ‘maroon’, ‘dimgrey’]    
       
linewidth 1.8    
    type float
    unique True
       
marker      
    unique True
       
markeredgecolor None    
    optional True
    unique True
       
markerfacecolor None    
    optional True
    unique True
       
markersize 5.0    
    type float
    unique True
       
shiftedbar_color bar_color    
    unique True
       
splitbar_color bar_color    
    unique True
       
stackedbar_color bar_color    
    unique True
       
style [‘solid’]    
    alias styles
       
sym_color [‘purple’, ‘darkgreen’, ‘red’, ‘olive’, ‘mediumvioletred’, ‘blueviolet’, ‘mediumseagreen’, ‘darkgoldenrod’, ‘maroon’, ‘dimgrey’]    
       

Keywords¶

alpha¶

default: 0.9

this is a percentage of opacity for the alpha channel, 0 is transparent, 1 is full color

attribute value
alias alpha_channel
type float
unique True

automatic_edge¶

default: True

when drawing bars, the edges of the bars are drawn in black by default. When the number of bars increases, the black of the edge may hide the actual bar color. In automatic edge mode, the black edge is removed, or changed to the value of edgewidth if it is defined when the number of bars exceeds the attribute edge_limit. If set to False, the edge is always drawn.

attribute value
unique True

bar_color¶

default: wheat, olive, yellow, darkmagenta, tan, orange, salmon, rosybrown, palevioletred, cadetblue, seagreen, darkgoldenrod, brown, darkkhaki, lightslategrey, darkslateblue, navy, maroon, dodgerblue, firebrick, floralwhite, lemonchiffon, lightseagreen

a list of colors which are affected in turn and in a cyclic way to each bar (part of a curve) in a single plot.

bar_width_factor¶

default: 0.85

when plotting bars, each bar is allocated a space (the length of its axis divided by the number of bars) to be plotted. This value is the percentage of that space. A value of 1 means that all bars will touch each others, less than 1 introduces gaps between them.

attribute value
type float
unique True

boxedline_color¶

default: line_color

attribute value
unique True

color¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

custom_bar_width¶

default: 0.4

sets the value to use for the width of the bar (a percentage 0 to 1 of the width between two consecutive ticks)

attribute value
unique True

custom_bar_width_limit¶

default: 0

when drawing few bars, they sometimes look too bulky, this keyword set the limit under which a custom width for the bar should be used, see ‘custom_bar_width’

attribute value
unique True

dot_color¶

default: wheat, olive, yellow, darkmagenta, tan, orange, salmon, rosybrown, palevioletred, cadetblue, seagreen, darkgoldenrod, brown, darkkhaki, lightslategrey, darkslateblue, navy, maroon

a list of colors which are affected in turn and in a cyclic way to each dot (part of a curve) in a single plot.

edge_limit¶

default: 120

when drawing bars, the edges of the bars are drawn in black by default. When the number of bars increases, the black of the edge may hide the actual bar color. In automatic edge mode, the black edge is removed when the number of bars exceeds the attribute edge_limit. If set to False, the edge is always drawn.

attribute value
unique True

edgecolor¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

edgewidth¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

grid¶

default: True

draws a grid on the background of the plot

attribute value
type bool
unique True

horizontal¶

default: True

this attribute determines the orientation of the plot, for example in a time series, by default the dates are on the x-axis and the data values on the y-axis. If this parameter is set to True, the dates are on the y-axis and the data values on the x-axis.

attribute value
type bool
unique True

line_color¶

default: blue, crimson, darkgreen, olive, mediumvioletred, blueviolet, mediumseagreen, darkgoldenrod, maroon, dimgrey

a list of colors which are affected in turn and in a cyclic way to each line (curve) in a single plot.

linewidth¶

default: 1.8

when drawing line, determines the thickness of the line

attribute value
type float
unique True

marker¶

default: “”

defines the marker to plot

attribute value
unique True

markeredgecolor¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

markerfacecolor¶

default: None

attribute value
optional True
unique True

markersize¶

default: 5.0

when drawing markers, determines the size of the markers.

attribute value
type float
unique True

shiftedbar_color¶

default: bar_color

attribute value
unique True

splitbar_color¶

default: bar_color

attribute value
unique True

stackedbar_color¶

default: bar_color

attribute value
unique True

style¶

default: solid

when drawing lines, determines the style of the line (e.g. solid, dash etc...).

attribute value
alias styles

sym_color¶

default: purple, darkgreen, red, olive, mediumvioletred, blueviolet, mediumseagreen, darkgoldenrod, maroon, dimgrey

a list of colors which are affected in turn and in a cyclic way to each group of symbols in a single plot.
